2603.24940.title: Evaluating adaptive and generative AI-based feedback and recommendations in a knowledge-graph-integrated programming learning system
2603.24940.paper_summary: This paper introduces the design and development of a framework that integrates a large language model (LLM) with a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approach leveraging both a knowledge graph and user interaction history. The framework is incorporated into a previously developed adaptive learning support system to assess learners' code, generate formative feedback, and recommend exercises. Moerover, this study examines learner preferences across three instructional modes; adaptive, Generative AI (GenAI), and hybrid GenAI-adaptive. An experimental study was conducted to compare the learning performance and perception of the learners, and the effectiveness of these three modes using four key log features derived from 4956 code submissions across all experimental groups. The analysis results show that learners receiving feedback from GenAI modes had significantly more correct code and fewer code submissions missing essential programming logic than those receiving feedback from adaptive mode. In particular, the hybrid GenAI-adaptive mode achieved the highest number of correct submissions and the fewest incorrect or incomplete attempts, outperforming both the adaptive-only and GenAI-only modes. Questionnaire responses further indicated that GenAI-generated feedback was widely perceived as helpful, while all modes were rated positively for ease of use and usefulness. These results suggest that the hybrid GenAI-adaptive mode outperforms the other two modes across all measured log features.
2603.24940.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了一個框架的設計與開發，該框架整合了一個大型語言模型（LLM）與一種檢索增強生成（RAG）方法，利用知識圖譜和用戶互動歷史。該框架被納入一個先前開發的自適應學習支持系統中，以評估學習者的代碼、生成形成性反饋並推薦練習。此外，本研究還考察了學習者在三種教學模式下的偏好；自適應、生成式人工智慧（GenAI）和混合GenAI-自適應。進行了一項實驗研究，以比較學習者的學習表現和感知，以及這三種模式的有效性，使用了來自4956份代碼提交的四個關鍵日誌特徵。分析結果顯示，接受GenAI模式反饋的學習者，其正確代碼的數量顯著多於那些接受自適應模式反饋的學習者，且缺少基本編程邏輯的代碼提交也較少。特別是，混合GenAI-自適應模式達到了最高的正確提交數量和最少的錯誤或不完整嘗試，超越了僅自適應模式和僅GenAI模式。問卷反饋進一步指出，GenAI生成的反饋被廣泛認為是有幫助的，而所有模式在易用性和實用性方面均獲得了正面評價。這些結果表明，混合GenAI-自適應模式在所有測量的日誌特徵中均優於其他兩種模式。
2603.24940.author: Lalita Na Nongkhai et.al.
2603.24940.authors: Lalita Na Nongkhai, Jingyun Wang, Adam Wynn, Takahiko Mendori
